meta.source: ICTV Master Species List, MSL23 (2005) to MSL40 (2024)
meta.note: Trajectory of every ICTV family and genus name across 20 years. A disappeared name may have been renamed, split, promoted, or abolished; the change type comes from ICTV records where present, otherwise from tracking a taxon's members forward. Polyphyletic splits cannot be resolved to a single family from the name alone.

taxa.name: Adintoviridae
taxa.note: ICTV renamed Adintoviridae to Eupolintoviridae by MSL40 (Renamed).

taxa.name: Autographiviridae
taxa.note: Autographiviridae (MSL39) was promoted; its members are distributed across 4 taxa in MSL40: Autotranscriptaviridae (22%), Autonotataviridae (18%), Autoscriptoviridae (16%), Autosignataviridae (8%). 36% now have no family assignment. A species-level answer needs the genome.

taxa.name: Bunyaviridae
taxa.note: Bunyaviridae (MSL30) was split; its members are distributed across 2 taxa in MSL40: Peribunyaviridae (20%), Phenuiviridae (20%). Only 40% of members were traceable by name across this gap; the rest were renamed further or need the VMR. A species-level answer needs the genome.

taxa.name: Cedratviridae
taxa.note: ICTV: Renamed,Moved,Demoted. Cedratviridae -> Orthocedratvirinae.

taxa.name: Comoviridae
taxa.note: Comoviridae (MSL24) maps to Secoviridae in MSL40 (100% of members).

taxa.name: Feraviridae
taxa.note: Members not traceable by name or taxon_id (the MSL40 taxnode change affects recent genus renames). Resolve via the VMR exemplar accession.

taxa.name: Flexireviridae
taxa.note: Flexireviridae (MSL37) maps to Graaviviridae in MSL40 (100% of members).

taxa.name: Flexiviridae
